ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Cumulative Grade Point Average */,
  "adviser_id" TEXT /* ID of the academic adviser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code (e.g., CS101) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* JSON array of course IDs that must be completed before taking this course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the instructor */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "enrollment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" TEXT /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "semester_id" TEXT /* ID of the semester */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the course (e.g., In Progress, Completed, Withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_courses_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "enrollment_id" TEXT /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "attendance_count" INTEGER /* Number of classes attended */,
  "absence_count" INTEGER /* Number of classes missed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES student_courses ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_tests" (
  "test_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each test score record */,
  "enrollment_id" TEXT /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "test_score" INTEGER /* Score obtained in the class test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the class test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_tests_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES student_courses ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mid_terms" (
  "mid_term_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each mid-term score record */,
  "enrollment_id" TEXT /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "mid_term_score" INTEGER /* Score obtained in the mid-term exam */,
  "mid_term_date" TEXT /* Date when the mid-term exam was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mid_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mid_terms_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES student_courses ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "finals" (
  "final_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each final score record */,
  "enrollment_id" TEXT /* ID of the enrollment */,
  "final_score" INTEGER /* Score obtained in the final exam */,
  "final_date" TEXT /* Date when the final exam was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("final_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_finals_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES student_courses ("enrollment_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the student
Date when the student enrolled in the university
ID of the instructor teaching the course
Number of credits the course is worth
JSON array of course IDs that must be completed before taking this course
Contact phone number of the instructor
